description: This Kotlin source file defines the 'SecureSampleApp' class which extends 'Application' and manages application-wide initialization, crash handling, safe mode configuration, and API client setup for a biometric authentication sample app.

classes.name: SecureSampleApp
classes.description: A custom Application class that handles app initialization, crash reporting, safe mode configuration, and provides access to core components like TokenStore, AuthManager, and ApiClient.

methods.name: onCreate
methods.description: Initializes crash handlers, safe mode settings, and core components upon application startup.

methods.name: recordInitFailureIfEmpty
methods.description: Records the first occurrence of an initialization failure message, setting the app into safe mode if not already.

methods.name: getOrCreateApiClient
methods.description: Lazily creates and returns an ApiClient instance if not in safe mode.
